evals.prompt: I need to find keywords for our SaaS blog about project management. We're a small startup, blog is about 3 months old with 10 posts.
evals.expected_output: Should check for product-marketing-context.md first. Should check for docs/seo/keyword-strategy.md and stop to help the user create it if it doesn't exist, walking through each required section (Target Audience, Topics to Focus On, Topics Never to Focus On, Competitors, Site, Service Pages). Should verify Ahrefs and GSC MCP servers are connected before proceeding. Should classify the blog as 'New' stage and set max KD to 15. Should skip GSC Source 1 since the blog is too new for striking distance data. Should use Ahrefs Keyword Explorer with aggressive filters (KD max 15, word count min 3, volume min 50-100). Should output a JSONL file to docs/seo/keyword-research/YYYY-MM-DD-keywords.jsonl.
assertions: Checks for product-marketing-context.md
Checks for docs/seo/keyword-strategy.md
Stops to create keyword-strategy.md if missing
Verifies Ahrefs and GSC MCP servers are connected
Classifies blog as New stage with max KD 15
Skips GSC source since blog is too new
Uses Ahrefs with KD filter of 15 or lower
Sets minimum word count filter to 3
Outputs JSONL file with dated filename

evals.prompt: what should I blog about? I have no idea where to start
evals.expected_output: Should trigger on casual 'what should I blog about' phrasing. Should check for keyword-strategy.md and product-marketing-context.md. If neither exists, should stop and help the user create keyword-strategy.md first — not proceed without it. Should ask about the blog niche, audience, and competitors. Should not start researching keywords until the strategy file is created with all required sections.
assertions: Triggers on casual phrasing
Checks for keyword-strategy.md
Stops to create strategy file before researching
Asks about niche, audience, competitors
Does not skip any required sections in strategy file
Walks user through each section interactively

evals.prompt: Run keyword research for our established marketing blog. We have 300+ posts, DR 45, and GSC connected. Focus on content marketing automation topics.
evals.expected_output: Should classify blog as Established with max KD 50. Should use all four sources: GSC striking distance (positions 11-30, sorted by impressions), Ahrefs Keyword Explorer (matching terms with KD max 50), Ahrefs Content Gap (using competitors from strategy file), and browser PAA (top 5-7 seeds). Should deduplicate across sources. Should build topic clusters aligned with the strategy file pillars. Should exclude any topics listed in 'Topics Never to Focus On'. Should assign tiers (1/2/3) based on KD, volume, and business relevance. Should produce JSONL with keyword, volume, kd, intent, topic, cluster, tier, source, lsi, and notes fields.
assertions: Classifies blog as Established with max KD 50
Uses GSC for striking distance keywords (positions 11-30)
Uses Ahrefs Keyword Explorer with appropriate filters
Uses Ahrefs Content Gap with competitor domains
Uses browser for PAA on top 5-7 seeds
Deduplicates across sources
Builds topic clusters
Excludes topics from 'Topics Never to Focus On'
Assigns priority tiers
JSONL includes all required fields including lsi

evals.prompt: I have a list of 50 keywords from Google Keyword Planner. Can you analyze them and tell me which ones to target?
evals.expected_output: Should accept external keyword lists and use Ahrefs Batch Analysis to vet them. Should apply the same KD threshold based on blog stage. Should classify intent for each keyword. Should cross-check against 'Topics to Focus On' and 'Topics Never to Focus On' from the strategy file. Should deduplicate against any existing keyword research JSONL files. Should rank and tier the imported keywords using the same framework as new research. Should output merged results to a new dated JSONL file.
assertions: Accepts external keyword list
Uses Ahrefs Batch Analysis for vetting
Applies KD threshold from blog stage
Classifies search intent for each keyword
Cross-checks against strategy file topics
Deduplicates against existing JSONL files
Ranks and tiers using standard framework
Outputs to new dated JSONL file

evals.prompt: Find competitor keyword gaps. Our competitors are ahrefs.com/blog, backlinko.com, and hubspot.com/blog.
evals.expected_output: Should use Ahrefs Content Gap analysis with the provided competitor domains. Should apply KD and volume filters based on blog stage. Should prioritize keywords where multiple competitors rank. Should check keywords against 'Topics Never to Focus On'. Should classify intent and build clusters from gap results. Should note which competitors rank for each keyword. Should merge with any existing research if applicable.
assertions: Uses Ahrefs Content Gap with all 3 competitors
Applies KD filter from blog stage
Prioritizes keywords ranked by multiple competitors
Checks against excluded topics
Classifies search intent
Builds topic clusters from results
Notes competitor ranking data

evals.expected_output: Should trigger even on minimal input. Should check for product-marketing-context.md and keyword-strategy.md. Should verify Ahrefs MCP is connected. If strategy file is missing, should stop and create it. If strategy file exists, should pull all context from it and proceed through the full research workflow without needing to ask many additional questions.
assertions: Triggers on minimal 'keyword research' input
Checks for product-marketing-context.md
Checks for keyword-strategy.md
Verifies MCP server prerequisites
Either creates strategy file or proceeds with existing one
Does not ask questions already answered in strategy file

evals.prompt: We need to update our keyword-strategy.md — our service pages have changed and we added two new personas.
evals.expected_output: Should read the existing keyword-strategy.md. Should help the user update the Service Pages section to match current repo state. Should verify service page URLs actually exist in src/. Should help add new persona sections with all required fields (Role, Goals, Pain points, Search behavior, Content preferences). Should not overwrite existing sections that haven't changed.
assertions: Reads existing keyword-strategy.md
Updates Service Pages section
Verifies service page URLs exist in repo
Adds new personas with all required fields
Preserves unchanged sections
